flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Southeast Missouri State University rose 14% between 2006 and 2009 ($5.5k → $6.3k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Southeast Missouri State University fell 13% between 2021 and 2024 (7.3k → 6.4k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Southeast Missouri State University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.5% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Southeast Missouri State University fell 35% between 2021 and 2024 ($15.3k → $9.9k).
